hero.title: World-Class Colombian Emeralds
hero.subtitle: Directly from the mines of Colombia to your hands

product.priceDisclaimer: * Prices may vary depending on the quality, size, and characteristics of each emerald. Contact us for a personalized quote.

about.title: About Us
about.history: Our story begins in the mines of Muzo, Boyacá, where the finest emeralds in the world are extracted.
about.value: We offer certified Colombian emeralds directly from the source, guaranteeing authenticity and the best prices for international buyers.
about.originText: Colombian emeralds come from the Muzo, Chivor, and Coscuez mines in the department of Boyacá. These mines have produced the finest emeralds in the world for centuries, renowned for their intense green color and exceptional clarity.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Reach out through any of these channels.
